mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PostLost( postlost_publisher_id, lostpet_id, lostpet_name, gender, breed, lost_time, lostcity, lost_location, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_wechat, description, status, created_at ) VALUES( #{publisher.id}, #{pet.id}, #{petName}, #{gender}, #{breed}, #{lostTime}, #{city}, #{lostLocation}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactWechat}, #{description}, #{status.value}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT p.postlost_id AS id, p.lostpet_name AS pet_name, p.gender, p.breed, p.lost_time, p.lostcity AS city, p.lost_location, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostLost p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postlost_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE p.postlost_id = #{id}

SELECT p.postlost_id AS id, p.lostpet_name AS pet_name, p.gender, p.breed, p.lost_time, p.lostcity AS city, p.lost_location, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostLost p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postlost_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1 AND p.status = #{status} AND p.lostcity = #{city} AND p.gender = #{gender} AND p.breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breed}, '%') ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.postlost_id AS id, p.lostpet_name AS pet_name, p.gender, p.breed, p.lost_time, p.lostcity AS city, p.lost_location, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostLost p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postlost_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE p.postlost_publisher_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PostLost SET status = 2, found_at = NOW() WHERE postlost_id = #{id}

UPDATE PostLost SET lostpet_name = #{petName}, gender = #{gender}, breed = #{breed}, lost_time = #{lostTime}, lostcity = #{city}, lost_location = #{lostLocation}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_wechat = #{contactWechat}, description = #{description}, status = #{status.value} WHERE postlost_id = #{id}
